task_completion.description: Verify that 'Redirect to the cart page after successful addition' is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General, under 'Add to cart behaviour', the checkbox for 'Redirect to the cart page after successful addition' should be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Enable AJAX add to cart buttons on archives' is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General, under 'Add to cart behaviour', the checkbox for 'Enable AJAX add to cart buttons on archives' should be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the weight unit is set to 'kg' and dimensions unit to 'cm'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General, under 'Measurements', the dropdown for 'Weight unit' must display 'kg' and the dropdown for 'Dimensions unit' must display 'cm'.

task_completion.description: Verify that product reviews are enabled and the verified owner label is shown.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General, under 'Reviews', the checkboxes for 'Enable product reviews' and 'Show "verified owner" label on customer reviews' must both be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that reviews are restricted to verified owners only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General, under 'Reviews', the checkbox for 'Reviews can only be left by "verified owners"' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that star ratings are enabled and required.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General, under 'Reviews', the checkboxes for 'Enable star rating on reviews' and 'Star ratings should be required, not optional' must both be checked.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the WordPress admin GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and interacting with the WooCommerce settings pages in a web browser, not using WP-CLI commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent saved the configured settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save changes' button being clicked at the bottom of the page, or a success banner stating 'Your settings have been saved.' at the top of the screen.

integrity.description: Ensure the interaction occurred in a genuine web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should display standard browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) rendering the WordPress dashboard.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring 9 settings in WooCommerce > Settings > Products > General. Target values: 'Redirect to the cart page after successful addition' = checked; 'Enable AJAX add to cart buttons on archives' = unchecked; 'Weight unit' = kg; 'Dimensions unit' = cm; 'Enable product reviews' = checked; 'Show verified owner label on customer reviews' = checked; 'Reviews can only be left by verified owners' = checked; 'Enable star rating on reviews' = checked; 'Star ratings should be required, not optional' = checked.
